# Emphant Studio v0.1.0

Initial open-source release of Emphant Studio, a local-first Tauri desktop AI workspace.

## Supported Downloads

- Windows x86_64
- macOS Apple Silicon
- Linux x86_64
- Linux ARM64

These initial community builds are unsigned. Windows and macOS may show security prompts when opening the app.

## Highlights

- Local-first desktop workbench powered by Tauri 2.
- React and TypeScript renderer with route-based workspace pages.
- Multi-topic AI chat workspace with assistant selection and structured message blocks.
- Agent, skill, file, knowledge, note, todo, profile, and settings views.
- Markdown rendering with GitHub Flavored Markdown and syntax highlighting.
- Shared workspace package for constants and TypeScript types.
